name: Calcium
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil broccoli for 95g and measure out 72 mg of calcium.
2. Boil spinach for 130g and measure out 208 mg of calcium.
3. Cook chick peas for 200g and measure out 92 mg of calcium.
4. Prepare baked beans for 200g and measure out 90 mg of calcium.
5. Process tofu for 60g and measure out 304 mg of calcium (note: some tofu may contain less).
6. Eat 4 dried figs to obtain 168 mg of calcium.
7. Measure out 15g of sesame seeds and consume 20 mg of calcium.
8. Eat 9 Brazil nuts weighing 30g for 54 mg of calcium.
9. Drink 0.3 pint of cows milk for 234 mg of calcium.
10. Enjoy a slice of cheddar cheese weighing 40g for 288 mg of calcium.
11. Savor a slice of soya cheese weighing 40g for 180 mg of calcium.
Fair Sources:
- Brown bread (2 slices) contains 70 mg of calcium.
- Dried apricots (8 pieces) provide 46 mg of calcium.
- Cottage cheese (45g or 1.5 oz) offers 33 mg of calcium.
- Boil French beans for 100g and measure out 41 mg of calcium.
